phrases.intent_en: Ask where the loyalty card registration desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de cadastro do cartão fidelidade?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH kuh-DAHSHT-roo DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN fee-dih-lee-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: Loyalty programs are standard in Portuguese pharmacies for medication discounts and wellness product tracking.

likely_response.local: Pode dirigir-se ao atendente de balcão para fazer o cadastro do cartão fidelidade.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih dee-ree-ZHEER-SIH OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN PUH-ruh fuh-ZEHR AW kuh-DAHSHT-roo DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN fee-dih-lee-DAH-dih.
likely_response.translation_en: You can go to the counter staff to register for the loyalty card.

responses.english: You can go to the counter staff to register for the loyalty card.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih dee-ree-ZHEER-SIH OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN PUH-ruh fuh-ZEHR AW kuh-DAHSHT-roo DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN fee-dih-lee-DAH-dih.
responses.local: Pode dirigir-se ao atendente de balcão para fazer o cadastro do cartão fidelidade.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o canto de consultas de saúde de viagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KAHNNG-too DIH koong-SOOW-tuhsh DIH SUHOO-dih DIH VEEAH-zhayng?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao farmacêutico ou ao consultor de saúde.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW fuh-ruh-muh-SEHOO-tee-koo OHW OW koong-soow-TOHR DIH SUHOO-dih.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the pharmacist or the health advisor.

responses.english: Ask the pharmacist or the health advisor.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW fuh-ruh-muh-SEHOO-tee-koo OHW OW koong-soow-TOHR DIH SUHOO-dih.
responses.local: Pergunte ao farmacêutico ou ao consultor de saúde.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the azulejo wall is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a parede de azulejos histórica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH puh-REH-dih DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh eesh-TAW-ree-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional Portuguese tiles feature geometric or historical motifs and are preserved in heritage commercial spaces across Coimbra.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso entregar a receita médica aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayngt-rih-GAHR AH reh-SAY-tuh MEH-dee-kuh uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Prescriptions require pharmacist verification and are processed at dedicated counters to comply with health regulations.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de atendimento.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the service counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the service counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, no balcão de atendimento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the loyalty card registration desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso registar o meu cartão de fidelização?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zheesh-TAHR AW MEHOO kuh-ruh-TOWN DIH fee-dih-lee-zuh-SOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese pharmacies, loyalty card registration is typically handled at the main counter.

likely_response.local: O registo pode ser feito com um atendente de balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW reh-ZHEESH-too PAW-dih SIHR FAY-too KOHM OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Registration can be done with a counter staff member.

responses.english: Registration can be done with a counter staff member.
responses.phonetic: AW reh-ZHEESH-too PAW-dih SIHR FAY-too KOHM OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN.
responses.local: O registo pode ser feito com um atendente de balcão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the traditional herbal shelf is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontram as plantas medicinais tradicionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruhng UHSH PLAHNNG-tuhsh meh-dee-see-NEYESH truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Herbal remedies remain widely used in Portugal, often displayed near vintage counters for traditional consultations.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está na estante de remédios tradicionais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH SHTAHNNG-tih DIH reh-MEH-deeoosh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's on the traditional remedies shelf.

responses.english: Good morning, it's on the traditional remedies shelf.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH SHTAHNNG-tih DIH reh-MEH-deeoosh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH.
responses.local: Bom dia, está na estante de remédios tradicionais.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso entregar a minha receita médica?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayngt-rih-GAHR AH MEE-nyuh reh-SAY-tuh MEH-dee-kuh?

likely_response.local: Entregue a receita ao atendente de balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: ayngt-REH-gih AH reh-SAY-tuh OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Hand the prescription to the counter staff.

responses.english: Hand the prescription to the counter staff.
responses.phonetic: ayngt-REH-gih AH reh-SAY-tuh OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN.
responses.local: Entregue a receita ao atendente de balcão.
